things.name: Great Pyramids of Giza
things.description: The only surviving Wonder of the Ancient World and the Great Sphinx on the Giza plateau

things.name: Egyptian Museum
things.description: World's greatest collection of ancient Egyptian artefacts including Tutankhamun's treasures

things.name: Khan el-Khalili Bazaar
things.description: Cairo's medieval Islamic bazaar selling spices, gold, papyrus and alabaster since 1382

things.name: Citadel of Saladin
things.description: 12th-century hilltop fortress with the magnificent Muhammad Ali mosque and city panorama

things.name: Coptic Cairo (Old Cairo)
things.description: Ancient Christian quarter with hanging churches, the Coptic Museum and Ben Ezra Synagogue

things.name: Al-Azhar Mosque
things.description: World's second oldest university and one of Islam's most important places of learning

things.name: Grand Egyptian Museum (GEM)
things.description: The world's largest archaeological museum housing the complete Tutankhamun collection

things.name: Nile Dinner Cruise
things.description: Dinner cruise along the Nile with belly dancing and live music past illuminated Cairo

things.name: Islamic Cairo
things.description: UNESCO-listed medieval Islamic city with 600 monuments and the Street of the Tentmakers

things.name: Memphis & Saqqara
things.description: Ancient capital with the Step Pyramid - the world's oldest cut stone structure
